title: Scaffold src-tauri/ with Cargo.toml, tauri.conf.json, build.rs, capabilities
summary: Created full Tauri v2 scaffold: Cargo.toml (duckdb bundled, tauri-plugin-dialog/shell, serde, chrono, uuid), tauri.conf.json (Data Monster, devUrl localhost:5173), build.rs, capabilities/default.json (core, dialog, shell), icons copied from reference project. Stub command modules created for all 8 command files + utils + models. cargo check passes cleanly.
notes: Used Value::Text not Value::Varchar for DuckDB 1.10502. Adapted from docs/src-tauri/ reference. Removed unneeded deps (reqwest, futures-util, tokio, walkdir, regex, tauri-plugin-screenshots).
decisions_made: Minimal deps — only what Data Monster needs. Port 5173 for SvelteKit dev server. Product name 'Data Monster', identifier 'com.data-monster.app'.
